addMeal.title: Add Meal
addMeal.errorMessage: Please enter a meal name and calories.
addMeal.aiDisclaimer: AI estimate — please verify before saving
addMeal.cameraPermissionMessage: Camera access is needed to take meal photos.
addMeal.analysisErrorMessage: Could not analyze the photo. Please enter macros manually.
addMeal.apiNotConfiguredMessage: Set EXPO_PUBLIC_ANALYZE_API_URL to enable AI analysis. You can still add the photo manually.
addMeal.unauthorizedMessage: The app is not authorized to use the analysis API.
addMeal.imageTooLargeMessage: Please choose a smaller photo (max 2 MB).
addMeal.rateLimitedMessage: You have reached the daily scan limit. Try again tomorrow or enter macros manually.
addMeal.aiQuotaMessage: The AI service quota has been reached. Please try again in a few minutes or enter macros manually.

mealItem.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"?

notifications.lunchReminder: Don't forget to log your lunch!

goals.title: Daily Goals
goals.description: Set your daily macro targets for progress tracking
goals.savedMessage: Your daily macro goals have been updated.

quotes: Every meal is an opportunity to fuel your goals.
Your body deserves the best fuel.
Eat with intention, progress with confidence.
Today, one more step toward your goals.
Nourishing your body is investing in yourself.
Motivation gets you started, habit keeps you going.
Balance and determination make the difference.
Every day counts, every meal too.
Take care of yourself, one meal at a time.
